summary: Iteration 21 - Data Infrastructure, Trust Layer, and Decision Engine testing complete. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Both new pages (Decision Engine and Trust Dashboard) fully verified with Portuguese translations. All APIs returning correct data.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/decision/universe/catalog returns 500 assets (220 US stocks, 69 international, 99 crypto, 54 ETFs, 25 forex, 15 commodities, 18 indices)
Backend: GET /api/decision/universe/catalog?query=BTC returns 3 search results (FBTC, GBTC, BTC)
Backend: GET /api/decision/universe/catalog?asset_type=crypto filters to 99 crypto assets
Backend: GET /api/decision/universe/catalog?asset_type=stock filters to 289+ stocks
Backend: Search with filter (query=ETH&asset_type=crypto) returns filtered results
Backend: GET /api/decision/BTC?asset_type=crypto returns structured decision with BUY/SELL/HOLD, probability, entry/target/stop levels, reasoning
Backend: GET /api/decision/AAPL?asset_type=stock returns stock decision with full analysis
Backend: Decision endpoint auto-logs signal to signals_log collection with signal_id
Backend: GET /api/decision/batch/top-opportunities returns 9 opportunities from 13 scanned assets
Backend: Top opportunities limit parameter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/trust/performance returns overview (total_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, max_drawdown, risk_reward, sharpe), signals metrics, monthly_performance, platform_stats (500+ assets)
Backend: GET /api/trust/track-record returns signals list with current_streak, accuracy_by_class
Backend: Track record limit parameter works correctly
Backend: GET /api/trust/signal/{signal_id} returns signal transparency with factors, reasoning, historical similar signals
Backend: Signal transparency returns 404 for invalid signal_id
Backend: POST /api/trust/signal/log logs new signal with all required fields
Backend: Signal log validates required fields (returns 422 for invalid payload)
Backend: Full integration flow works: decision → signal logged → retrievable in track-record → transparency available
Frontend: Decision Engine page loads at /decision-engine with Portuguese title 'Motor de Decisao'
Frontend: Decision Engine search bar found with placeholder 'Pesquisar qualquer ativo (BTC, AAPL, EUR/USD...)'
Frontend: Decision Engine search works - typing 'BTC' shows 3 results dropdown (FBTC ETF, GBTC ETF, BTC Crypto)
Frontend: Clicking search result loads full decision analysis view with SELL verdict
Frontend: Decision result shows Probabilidade, Entrada, Alvo, Stop Loss, Risco/Retorno metrics
Frontend: 'Por que este trade?' section shows Estrutura, Liquidez, Volatilidade, Sentimento
Frontend: 'Sinais Quantitativos' shows RSI, MACD, Momento values
Frontend: 'Raciocinio da IA' section shows numbered reasoning points
Frontend: Factor scores display (Technical, Volume, Sentiment, Momentum, Risk, Score Total)
Frontend: Top Oportunidades section loads with 8 opportunity cards
Frontend: Clicking opportunity card (META) loads decision analysis
Frontend: Trust Dashboard page loads at /trust-dashboard with Portuguese title 'Performance Publica'
Frontend: Trust Dashboard shows 6 overview metrics (Total Trades, Taxa Vitoria, P&L Total, Max Drawdown, Risco/Retorno, Sharpe)
Frontend: Platform stats bar shows Usuarios, Estrategias, Ativos (500+), Acuracia Sinais, Total Sinais
Frontend: Performance Mensal section shows monthly performance with bar chart
Frontend: Track Record Verificado section shows signals list with direction, probability, outcome status
Frontend: Accuracy by class breakdown shows Etf, Stock, Crypto signal counts
Frontend: Atualizar (Refresh) button present
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Motor de Decisao' and 'Transparencia' nav items under INTELIGENCIA section
Frontend: All Portuguese translations working correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Asset universe correctly returns exactly 500 assets as specified
Decision Engine uses real technical analysis (RSI, MACD, MA) on market data from providers
Signals are auto-logged to MongoDB signals_log collection for track record
Trust Layer aggregates real data from paper_trades and signals_log collections
All decision endpoints return signal_id for transparency tracking
Portuguese translations complete for both new pages
seed_data_creation: Signals auto-logged to signals_log collection during testing (BTC, ETH, AAPL, SOL, MSFT decisions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 tested the new Data Infrastructure (500+ asset universe), Trust Layer, and Decision Engine. Decision Engine at /decision-engine provides BUY/SELL/HOLD signals with entry/target/stop levels, technical analysis, and multi-factor reasoning. Trust Dashboard at /trust-dashboard shows public performance metrics, monthly performance, and verified track record. All signals are auto-logged and can be retrieved via /api/trust/signal/{signal_id} for full transparency. Portuguese translations working (Motor de Decisao, Transparencia, Por que este trade?, Raciocinio da IA, etc). Asset universe has exactly 500 assets: 220 US stocks, 69 international stocks, 99 crypto, 54 ETFs, 25 forex, 15 commodities, 18 indices.

mocked_components.note: NO MOCKED APIS - All endpoints use real data
real_integrations: Decision Engine: Uses real technical analysis on market data from CoinGecko, Twelve Data, Alpha Vantage
Asset Universe: Static catalog of 500 real tradeable assets
Trust Layer: Aggregates real data from MongoDB collections (paper_trades, signals_log, strategies)
Signal Logging: Real MongoDB writes to signals_log collection

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All Data Infrastructure, Trust Layer, and Decision Engine features working correctly.
